_meta.purpose: Business logic context for Qwen Coder 14B — bucket classification rules, metric formulas, movement logic, DAX calculation patterns
_meta.critical_note: This JSON contains the core business rules. Qwen MUST follow these exactly when generating DAX or interpreting user questions.

bucket_classification._note: Op bucket is derived from these rules in PRIORITY ORDER. Apply top-to-bottom. First match wins.

rules.condition: dpd = 0 AND Bounce_status = 'PAID' AND Emi_increase = 0 AND day_wise_asset_classification = 'Standard Asset'
rules.description: Fully healthy, on-time, paid via NACH, no EMI increase
rules.dax_filter: Final Table[dpd] = 0 && Final Table[Bounce status] = "PAID" && Final Table[Emi increase] = 0 && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] = "Standard Asset"

rules.condition: dpd = 0 AND (Emi_increase = 1 OR Bounce_status <> 'PAID') AND day_wise_asset_classification = 'Standard Asset'
rules.description: DPD is zero but has either EMI increase or non-PAID bounce — watch bucket
rules.dax_filter: Final Table[dpd] = 0 && (Final Table[Emi increase] = 1 || Final Table[Bounce status] <> "PAID") && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] = "Standard Asset"

rules.condition: dpd > 0 AND dpd < 30 AND day_wise_asset_classification = 'Standard Asset'
rules.dax_filter: Final Table[dpd] > 0 && Final Table[dpd] < 30 && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] = "Standard Asset"

rules.condition: dpd >= 30 AND dpd < 60 AND day_wise_asset_classification = 'Standard Asset'
rules.dax_filter: Final Table[dpd] >= 30 && Final Table[dpd] < 60 && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] = "Standard Asset"

rules.condition: dpd >= 60 AND dpd < 90 AND day_wise_asset_classification = 'Standard Asset' AND Risk_NPA = 0
rules.description: Severe delinquency, pre-NPA — 60 to 89 days overdue
rules.dax_filter: Final Table[dpd] >= 60 && Final Table[dpd] < 90 && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] = "Standard Asset" && Final Table[Risk NPA] = 0

rules.condition: dpd > 90 AND day_wise_asset_classification <> 'Standard Asset' OR (dpd >= 60 AND dpd < 90 AND day_wise_asset_classification = 'Standard Asset' AND Risk_NPA = 1)
rules.description: Non-Performing Asset — either DPD > 90 with non-standard classification, or 60-89 DPD with Risk NPA flag
rules.dax_filter: (Final Table[dpd] > 90 && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] <> "Standard Asset") || (Final Table[dpd] >= 60 && Final Table[dpd] < 90 && Final Table[day_wise_asset_classification] = "Standard Asset" && Final Table[Risk NPA] = 1)

rules.condition: Loan has been written off from books
rules.description: Written off — removed from active book but collection continues due to overdue amount
rules.dax_filter: Filter Op bucket = 'Write-off' directly — this is pre-set in the data

bucket_movement_logic._note: Cust wise status is derived from Op bucket → Closing bucket transition

Resolution.label: Resolution
Resolution.description: Count of customers who improved from delinquent bucket back to Current/Risk X
Resolution.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID) WHERE Cust wise status = 'Norm'
Resolution.dax_pattern: CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm")
Resolution.important: Norm means improved — Current customers are already performing, they are NOT in resolution count

Resolution_Percent.label: Resolution %
Resolution_Percent.description: Resolution count as % of total customers in the filtered segment
Resolution_Percent.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID WHERE status=Norm) / COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID total) * 100
Resolution_Percent.dax_pattern: DIVIDE(CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm"), DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])) * 100
Resolution_Percent.important: Applies to delinquent buckets. Denominator = all customers in the filtered dataset.

Bounce_Count.label: Bounce Count
Bounce_Count.description: Count of customers where Bounce status is Tech or Non Tech
Bounce_Count.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID) WHERE Bounce_status IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')
Bounce_Count.dax_pattern: CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Bounce status] IN {"Tech", "Non Tech"})
Bounce_Count.important: NEVER include PAID in bounce count. PAID = successful payment, NOT a bounce.

Bounce_Percent.label: Bounce %
Bounce_Percent.description: Bounce count as % of total customers
Bounce_Percent.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID WHERE bounce) / COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID total) * 100
Bounce_Percent.dax_pattern: DIVIDE(CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Bounce status] IN {"Tech", "Non Tech"}), DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])) * 100

Coverage.label: Coverage
Coverage.description: Count of allocated customers who were visited
Coverage.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID) WHERE Visit_or_not = 'Visited' AND Allocated_or_not = 'Allocated'
Coverage.dax_pattern: CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Visit or not] = "Visited", Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated")
Coverage.important: Only count customers where Allocated or not = 'Allocated'. Non-allocated EXCLUDED from coverage.

Coverage_Percent.label: Coverage %
Coverage_Percent.description: Visited-allocated customers as % of total allocated customers
Coverage_Percent.dax_pattern: DIVIDE(CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Visit or not] = "Visited", Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated"), CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated")) * 100

Intensity.label: Intensity
Intensity.description: Average number of field visits per customer in the month
consumer_language: how many times visited per customer
Intensity.dax_pattern: DIVIDE(SUM(Final Table[Visit Count]), DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]))

Portfolio_Outstanding.label: Portfolio Outstanding
Portfolio_Outstanding.description: Total balance principal across filtered loans

Total_Overdue.label: Total Overdue
Total_Overdue.description: Sum of TOD (Total Overdue = principal + interest + pre-EMI overdue)

customer_level_metrics.reason: One customer can have multiple loanappno in the same month. Counting loanappno overstates customer count.

loan_level_metrics.reason: Loan-level metrics should not deduplicate by customer.

null_handling.NPA_Origination_Date: NULL = account has never been in NPA. Exclude from NPA age analysis.
null_handling.NPA MOB: NULL = account is not in NPA. Treat as 0 or exclude from NPA duration analysis.
null_handling.Bounce charges: NULL = no charges applicable. Not a data error.
null_handling.overdue_amount: NULL = no overdue charges. Not a data error.
null_handling.Allocation 1: 'NA' string (not null) = Non Allocated. Use string comparison: Allocation 1 <> 'NA'
null_handling.TL: 'No TL' string (not null) = no team leader assigned. Use string comparison: TL <> 'No TL'
null_handling.Payment mode: 'Blank' string = no payment made. Not null — explicitly set.
